prompt: Create a cinematic black-and-white studio portrait collage of the same handsome young adult man with dark swept-back hair, light stubble, strong jawline, and expressive eyes shown in exactly five narrow vertical panels separated by thin glowing white divider lines. Use a horizontal 4:3 canvas with a deep black background and dramatic low-key lighting, high contrast, crisp skin texture, glossy hair highlights, and a monochrome editorial fashion look. The man wears a plain black crew-neck shirt in every panel, framed from upper chest to top of head, with each face large and close to the camera. Show exactly five expressions from left to right: 1) intense serious stare with furrowed brow looking directly forward, 2) warm closed-mouth smile looking forward, 3) broad open laugh with eyes slightly squinting, 4) thoughtful skeptical look glancing upward to the side with one hand resting on his chin, 5) calm neutral direct gaze with relaxed face. Keep the same identity, hairstyle, clothing, lighting style, and scale across all panels. Make the image feel cinematic in every pixel, like a dramatic actor expression study or emotion contact sheet. No text, no logos, no color, no extra people, no props other than the hand in the fourth panel.
